title: Build deterministic single-score reference datasets from curated examples and labels
description:
## Summary
Build deterministic single-score reference datasets from curated examples and resolved labels.

## Deliverables
- Support inputs from scorecard examples, feedback items, score results, and imported/generated examples.
- Materialize a frozen single-score `DataSet` artifact.
- Snapshot labels into the dataset artifact so evaluation never dereferences live source records during regression runs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Starting implementation. First concrete path: deterministic single-score reference dataset build from scorecard example item associations, with labels resolved and snapshotted into DataSet artifact metadata/buildContext/provenance.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Progress update (implementation in-flight):

Implemented deterministic reference-build mechanics in dataset load pipeline:
- Added deterministic row-ordering before parquet materialization (--deterministic-order).
- Added frozen reference artifact mode (--reference-frozen) with DataSet provenance/buildContext snapshots.
- Added reference role tagging (--reference-role: active/regression/benchmark).
- Added optional score pointer assignment to created DataSet (--assign-reference-pointer: active/regression/benchmark), wiring to Score reference fields.
- Integrated label-resolution report propagation from dataframe attrs into DataSet provenance when available.

Files touched in this step:
- plexus/cli/dataset/datasets.py

Validation:
- python -m py_compile on modified modules passed.
- pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/datasets_test.py -k "load or createDataSet or updateDataSet" -> 3 passed.

Remaining work for this task:
- Add explicit multi-source builder path for scorecard-example associations + feedback/score-result/imported label joins (current work establishes materialization and metadata plumbing).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text:
Implementation completed for deterministic single-score reference dataset build path.

What now exists:
1) New built-in data cache: plexus.data.ScorecardExampleReferenceItems
- Builds deterministic rows from scorecard example associations.
- For each example item, resolves label from latest matching feedback item when available.
- Fallback label source uses latest score result value.
- Imported/generated labels are resolved via item metadata through FeedbackItems label resolver.

2) Deterministic label-resolution policy in FeedbackItems
- Source priority enforced in one path:
  1. vetted/gold feedback
  2. regular final feedback
  3. score-result/imported label
- Unresolved items are skipped with explicit skip-id reporting in dataframe attrs and logs.

3) Frozen DataSet materialization + provenance snapshot
- dataset load supports:
  - --reference-frozen
  - --reference-role [active|regression|benchmark]
  - --assign-reference-pointer [active|regression|benchmark]
  - --deterministic-order
- DataSet provenance/buildContext metadata captures source class, parameters, row schema, and label-resolution report.

4) Built-in class wiring
- Direct dataset config now resolves class ScorecardExampleReferenceItems from plexus.data namespace.

Validation executed:
- pytest -q plexus/data/test_feedback_items.py -k "reference_label_resolution or skips_unresolved or create_dataset_rows_with_data"  => 4 passed
- pytest -q plexus/cli/dataset/datasets_test.py -k "load_command_success or builtin_reference_cache_class_resolution or load_command_applies_item_pipeline_to_text" => 3 passed

Operator example:
plexus dataset load --source <data_source_identifier> --reference-frozen --reference-role regression --assign-reference-pointer regression --deterministic-order

This satisfies the task deliverables for a working deterministic single-score reference dataset build flow with snapshotted labels/provenance.
